all.en: This report documents the quarterly safety inspection of our main warehouse.
all.zh: 本報告記錄了我們主倉庫的季度安全檢查。

all.en: The inspection was conducted by an external occupational safety consultant.
all.zh: 本次檢查由外部職業安全顧問執行。

all.en: All twelve loading docks were assessed for compliance with regulations.
all.zh: 全部十二個裝卸碼頭均針對法規遵循進行評估。

all.en: Forklift operators were observed during a full eight hour shift.
all.zh: 堆高機操作員接受了完整八小時班次的觀察。

all.en: Emergency exits remained clearly marked and free of obstructions.
all.zh: 緊急出口維持清楚標示且未受阻擋。

all.en: Fire extinguishers were serviced within the last six months as required.
all.zh: 依規定，滅火器於過去六個月內已完成保養。

all.en: However, three sprinkler heads on aisle nine were partially blocked by pallets.
all.zh: 然而第九走道有三個灑水頭被棧板部分阻擋。

all.en: Two workers were not wearing high visibility vests in the receiving area.
all.zh: 收貨區有兩名工人未穿著高能見度背心。

all.en: One eye wash station near the chemical storage area was non functional.
all.zh: 化學品儲存區附近的一座洗眼器無法運作。

all.en: Pallet racking on bay seven showed signs of impact damage at the base.
all.zh: 第七貨架區的棧板架基座出現撞擊損傷跡象。

all.en: Lighting in the cold storage section measured below the required lux level.
all.zh: 冷藏區照明測得的勒克斯值低於規定標準。

all.en: Battery charging stations lacked adequate ventilation during peak use.
all.zh: 電池充電站在尖峰使用時段缺乏足夠通風。

all.en: The first aid kit on the second floor was missing several essential items.
all.zh: 二樓的急救箱缺少數項必要物品。

all.en: Training records for new hires were complete and properly signed off.
all.zh: 新進員工的訓練紀錄完整且已正式簽核。

all.en: Monthly safety drills have been conducted without any missed sessions.
all.zh: 每月安全演習均依時舉行未有缺席。

all.en: Spill response kits were fully stocked at all designated locations.
all.zh: 防漏應變組於各指定地點均備品完整。

all.en: The consultant rated overall safety performance at seventy eight out of one hundred.
all.zh: 顧問將整體安全表現評為一百分中的七十八分。

all.en: Five findings were classified as high priority requiring immediate action.
all.zh: 五項發現被列為需立即處置的高優先項目。

all.en: Eight medium priority items must be resolved within thirty days.
all.zh: 八項中優先項目須於三十日內完成改善。

all.en: The facility manager will own the corrective action plan going forward.
all.zh: 場館經理將後續負責矯正措施計畫。

all.en: A follow up inspection is scheduled for the second week of next month.
all.zh: 後續檢查訂於下月第二週進行。

all.en: All findings have been logged in our safety management system.
all.zh: 所有發現均已記錄於我們的安全管理系統中。

all.en: Affected employees will receive refresher training before the follow up visit.
all.zh: 受影響員工將於後續訪查前接受複訓。

all.en: The full inspection checklist is attached as appendix A to this report.
all.zh: 完整檢查清單作為附件 A 附於本報告之後。

all.en: Continued vigilance from every team member remains essential to our safety culture.
all.zh: 每位團隊成員的持續警覺對我們的安全文化至關重要。

all.en: Safety committee meetings will now occur monthly rather than quarterly going forward.
all.zh: 安全委員會今後將由每季改為每月召開。

all.en: A reward program will recognize teams that report near miss incidents promptly.
all.zh: 獎勵方案將表揚迅速通報近未遂事件的團隊。

all.en: Updated signage in multiple languages will be installed across all main aisles.
all.zh: 多語版標示將更新並設置於所有主要走道。

all.en: Forklift speed limiters will be calibrated to a maximum of eight kilometers per hour.
all.zh: 堆高機限速器將校準至每小時最高八公里。

all.en: An external auditor will conduct a surprise visit within the next ninety days.
all.zh: 外部稽核員將於未來九十天內進行突擊訪查。

all.en: Personal protective equipment will be restocked weekly at all entry points.
all.zh: 個人防護裝備將於各出入口每週補充。

all.en: Workers may anonymously report hazards through a new mobile reporting application.
all.zh: 員工可透過新版行動通報應用程式匿名回報危害。

all.en: Leadership will review safety metrics in every weekly operations meeting.
all.zh: 領導層將於每週營運會議檢視安全指標。

all.en: Capital budget has been approved for upgraded smoke detection across the facility.
all.zh: 資本預算已核准用於升級全廠區的煙霧偵測系統。

all.en: Together these measures aim to bring our score above ninety within two quarters.
all.zh: 上述措施旨在於兩季內讓評分提升至九十分以上。

all.en: Behavioral safety observations will now be logged daily by frontline supervisors.
all.zh: 行為安全觀察今後將由第一線主管每日登錄。

all.en: Each shift begins with a brief safety huddle covering top hazards for the day.
all.zh: 每班開始前皆會召開簡短安全會議，說明當日主要危害。

all.en: Visitor orientation videos must be viewed before entering any operational zone.
all.zh: 進入任何作業區前訪客須先觀看入廠導覽影片。

all.en: Contractors are now required to attend a quarterly safety alignment workshop.
all.zh: 承包商現須每季出席安全共識工作坊。

all.en: Lockout tagout audits will be performed unannounced at least twice each month.
all.zh: 上鎖掛牌稽核每月將至少進行兩次不預警查核。

all.en: Forklift refresher certification is mandatory for all licensed operators yearly.
all.zh: 所有合格堆高機操作員每年須完成複訓認證。

all.en: Slip and fall incidents have decreased by thirty percent since the floor recoating.
all.zh: 自地面重新塗布以來，滑跌事件減少了百分之三十。

all.en: Heat stress monitoring will be activated automatically when temperatures exceed thresholds.
all.zh: 溫度超過門檻時將自動啟動熱壓力監測。

all.en: Hydration stations have been added at every major intersection inside the building.
all.zh: 建築內各主要交叉點皆已設置補水站。

all.en: Recognition for safety milestones will be celebrated at every all hands meeting.
all.zh: 安全里程碑將於每場全體會議中接受表揚。
